extensionDescription.message: Save images and videos from the web to Artist Reference Collection (ARC).

modalHowToSave.message: Hover over an image or video and click the save button that appears. You can also use the context menu.

modalQueueInfo.message: Media files go into a queue (up to 50). When you open ARC with Import enabled, the queue is sent to your library automatically.

modalPinterestBody.message: You can download this Pinterest board. All files will be added to a collection with the same name.

modalQueueBody.message: The item was added to the queue (up to 50). When you open ARC with Import enabled, the queue is sent to your library automatically.

statusDisabled.message: Import API is disabled in ARC settings

statusQueued.message: Queued — will send when ARC is available

disabledToastBody.message: Enable Import API in ARC Settings → Browser extension.

boardDownloadNoPins.message: No pins found on this page

boardDownloadNoContent.message: Could not read the board page. Refresh the tab and try again

modalInstagramBody.message: You can download this Instagram saved collection. Each post will be saved into its own collection named by post ID.

modalArtstationBody.message: Download all images from this ArtStation artwork or project page into a collection.

bulkDownloadNoItems.message: No items found on this page

bulkDownloadNoContent.message: Could not read the page. Refresh the tab and try again
